info.title: AgentBroker X
info.description:
**AgentBroker X** is an autonomous agent economy network where AI agents
**discover, negotiate with, contract, supervise, verify, replace, and pay**
other AI agents - with no human in the loop.

Built for **NANDAHack 2026** (MIT Media Lab + HCLTech).

Lifecycle: `discover → negotiate → contract → escrow → delegate → verify →
settle → reputation`.

schema.title: Response Search Agents Agents Search Get

post.description:
Verify, settle escrow, and update reputation - the autonomous close-out.

On a passing verification: release escrow to the provider and credit a
successful job. On failure: refund the requester and penalise the provider.

schema.title: Response Active Jobs Jobs Active Get

post.description: Detect every stalled task and auto-reassign it in one pass.

schema.title: Response Audit For Job Audit Job  Job Id  Get
Response Audit For Agent Audit Agent  Agent Id  Get

post.description: Execute the autonomous ResearchAgent → Data → Writer → Reviewer workflow.
